palette_relationships: warm skin and amber product remain separated from muted botanical greens
lighting_architecture: one motivated soft key with controlled ambient fill and readable material edges
look_core.contrast_curve: gentle toe, readable lower mids, controlled midtone separation
look_core.black_floor: soft open black without gray wash or crushed detail
look_core.highlight_rolloff: long smooth roll-off; no clipped skin or specular product edges
skin_rendering: preserve complexion and texture; luminous highlights without whitening or smoothing
material_response: amber oil remains translucent; glass and liquid edges stay physically readable
optical_texture: subtle diffusion around non-critical practical highlights; product labels remain crisp
grain_and_texture: fine restrained organic grain with no plastic denoising
atmosphere: clean air with light botanical depth separation; no decorative haze over product proof
invariant_rules: preserve verified product base color and material construction
keep highlights controlled and blacks readable

global_look_prompt_full:
GLOBAL LOOK CORE — inherit this block verbatim in every static-generation and video-generation prompt.
Identity: restrained natural-luxury sensorial realism
Palette relationship: warm skin and amber product remain separated from muted botanical greens
Lighting architecture: one motivated soft key with controlled ambient fill and readable material edges
Contrast curve: gentle toe, readable lower mids, controlled midtone separation
Black floor: soft open black without gray wash or crushed detail
Highlight rolloff: long smooth roll-off; no clipped skin or specular product edges
Skin rendering: preserve complexion and texture; luminous highlights without whitening or smoothing
Material response: amber oil remains translucent; glass and liquid edges stay physically readable
Optical texture: subtle diffusion around non-critical practical highlights; product labels remain crisp
Grain and texture: fine restrained organic grain with no plastic denoising
Atmosphere: clean air with light botanical depth separation; no decorative haze over product proof
Invariant: preserve verified product base color and material construction
Invariant: preserve source-supported skin identity
Invariant: keep highlights controlled and blacks readable
Use only the assigned legal Look State for environmental changes. Allow only explicitly approved Shot Look Deltas. Never introduce crushed blacks, clipped skin, neon saturation, arbitrary teal-orange grading, product recoloring, material redesign, plastic skin, heavy bloom or inconsistent light-source direction.

look_states.name: late-afternoon botanical exterior
look_states.core_relation: hero manifestation of the global core
look_states.state_prompt_full: LOOK_STATE_FIELD — hero manifestation of the global core; architectural glass-atrium exterior; late-afternoon motivated sun; soft lateral sun as key, broad sky fill, restrained botanical bounce; skin and product retained below clipping with open background separation; warm key, neutral-to-cool ambient separation without cyan skin; stable lateral key from camera-right world direction; medium-low contrast with readable local texture; preserve complexion and undertone under warm key; amber remains source-bound and distinct from skin; oil translucency and glass edges remain legible; minor exposure compensation for wide versus close framing; forbid product recolor, crushed shadows, new grade family.
look_states.illumination_architecture: soft lateral sun as key, broad sky fill, restrained botanical bounce
look_states.exposure_relation: skin and product retained below clipping with open background separation
look_states.color_temperature_relation: warm key, neutral-to-cool ambient separation without cyan skin
look_states.light_direction: stable lateral key from camera-right world direction
look_states.contrast_behavior: medium-low contrast with readable local texture
look_states.skin_tone_protection: preserve complexion and undertone under warm key
look_states.product_color_protection: amber remains source-bound and distinct from skin
material_response_rules: oil translucency and glass edges remain legible
allowed_deltas: minor exposure compensation for wide versus close framing

look_states.name: controlled tactile macro
look_states.core_relation: close-range material manifestation of the same global core
look_states.state_prompt_full: LOOK_STATE_MACRO — close-range material manifestation of the same global core; oil, skin or packaging macro insert; large soft lateral source plus narrow edge separation for transparent material; protect oil and skin highlights while raising tactile midtone detail; same warm-neutral relation with reduced background color influence; retain camera-right world key direction unless object orientation requires documented rotation; slightly stronger local microcontrast, same global black floor and roll-off; retain pores and complexion; no whitening or plastic smoothing; amber liquid, glass thickness and label white remain source-bound; show liquid boundary, refraction edge and wet highlight without invented sparkle; reduce diffusion around label; increase edge separation without changing material; forbid opaque oil, iridescent glass, clipped specular edge.
activation_conditions: oil, skin or packaging macro insert
look_states.illumination_architecture: large soft lateral source plus narrow edge separation for transparent material
look_states.exposure_relation: protect oil and skin highlights while raising tactile midtone detail
look_states.color_temperature_relation: same warm-neutral relation with reduced background color influence
look_states.light_direction: retain camera-right world key direction unless object orientation requires documented rotation
look_states.contrast_behavior: slightly stronger local microcontrast, same global black floor and roll-off
look_states.skin_tone_protection: retain pores and complexion; no whitening or plastic smoothing
look_states.product_color_protection: amber liquid, glass thickness and label white remain source-bound
material_response_rules: show liquid boundary, refraction edge and wet highlight without invented sparkle
allowed_deltas: increase edge separation without changing material

shot_look_delta.reason: hero state already fits the shot
